label: Aggressive Expansion
desc: Gain 1 random Basic Gem when you Replenish.

label: All-Seeing Eye
desc: Reveal 2 extra L3 cards. Gold pays double toward missing L3 costs.

label: Backup Supply
desc: Start with 2 random Basic Gems.

label: Bounty Hunter
desc: Gain 1 random Basic Gem when you buy a card with Crowns.

label: The Collector
desc: You may reserve cards from your opponent's reserved area.

label: Color Preference
desc: Random color costs -1 for you (assigned at start).

label: Deep Pockets
desc: Gem Cap increased to 12.

label: Desperate Gamble
desc: Start with 2 Extra Gold. You cannot take 3 Gems with the Take Gems action. Gain 1 Special Privilege every 2 turns.

label: Double Agent
desc: Each Privilege Scroll takes 2 gems instead of 1. Gem Cap: 8.

label: Down Payment
desc: Reserved Cards cost 1 less (basic gems only).

label: Echo Reservoir
desc: Remember your opponent's last purchased card abilities. Each development-card purchase echoes that memory once, then clears it.

label: Extortion
desc: Every 2nd time you Replenish, steal 1 Basic Gem from opponent.

label: Flexible Discount
desc: Reduce cost of Level 2 and 3 cards by 1 (basic gems only).

label: Gold Reserve
desc: Start with 1 Extra Gold and 1 random Reserved Card.

label: King of Greed
desc: All cards give +1 Point.

label: Head Start
desc: Start with 1 random Basic Gem.

label: Hoarder
desc: If holding 3 Reserved Cards, gain 1 random Basic Gem at start of turn.

label: Insight
desc: Reveal the top card of the Level 1 Deck.

label: Intelligence
desc: Gain Optional Action: Peek at the top 3 cards of any deck.

label: Minimalist
desc: Your first 2 purchased cards provide double Bonuses. Gem Cap: 8.

label: Nimble Fingers
desc: Gain 1 random Basic Gem when you Reserve a card.

label: Classic
desc: No buffs.

label: Pacifist
desc: Immune to all negative effects, including opponent Steal, and your standard Privilege Scrolls cannot be transferred away when the board Privilege supply is empty. Start with 1 Extra Gold and 1 Special Privilege.

label: Patient Investor
desc: Gain 1 Extra Gold on your first Reserve action.

label: Pearl Trader
desc: Gem Cap increased to 11. Start with 1 Extra Pearl.

label: Privilege Favor
desc: Start with 1 Special Privilege.

label: The Puppet Master
desc: Gain Optional Action: discard one reserved card, return it to the bottom of its deck, and gain 1 random Basic Gem. You may take this action multiple times in the same turn.

label: Recycler
desc: Start with 1 random Basic Gem. Refund 1 Basic Gem when buying a Level 2 or 3 card.

label: Royal Blood
desc: Start with 1 Crown.

label: Royal Envoy
desc: After your 5th turn fully resolves, pick 1 remaining Royal Card.

label: Speculator
desc: Gain 2 random Basic Gems after buying a reserved card.

label: Wonder Architect
desc: Your first 3 Level 3 cards cost 3 less (basic gems only).
